description: Fabric Lakehouse exposing the gold/ Delta tables (written by Databricks notebook 03_gold_aggregate.py) directly to Power BI via DirectLake — no data movement, no scheduled refresh, the semantic model in powerbi/ reads straight off these OneLake files.

shortcuts.name: sales_by_region_category_month
shortcuts.comment: Shortcut to the ADLS Gen2 gold container provisioned by terraform/storage.tf — Fabric reads it without copying the data into OneLake.

why_shortcuts_not_copies: OneLake shortcuts mean the existing ADLS Gen2 gold container (already governed by the storage lifecycle policy and RBAC in terraform/storage.tf) becomes a Fabric Lakehouse with zero data duplication and zero extra storage cost — Fabric just points at it.
